strings: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas
Do you have a formal safety program?
Do you have written contracts with all subcontractors?
Are short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted?
Is there 24-hour doorperson or security on premises?
What percentage of units are regularly occupied vs. vacant?
Is there any commercial occupancy within the building?
Are there swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities?
When was the last plumbing, HVAC, and electrical system update?
HVAC replaced 2020; plumbing and electrical original (2005)
Are written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors?
Are EV charging stations installed on the premises?
Is the building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R?
Are fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring?
Is there a quality control / quality assurance program?
Are Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained?
Have there been any OSHA citations in the past 3 years?
Are cyber liability protections in place?

ANY PERSON WHO KNOWINGLY AND WITH INTENT TO DEFRAUD ANY INSURANCE COMPANY OR OTHER PERSON FILES AN APPLICATION FOR INSURANCE OR STATEMENT OF CLAIM CONTAINING ANY MATERIALLY FALSE INFORMATION, OR CONCEALS FOR THE PURPOSE OF MISLEADING, INFORMATION CONCERNING ANY FACT MATERIAL THERETO, COMMITS A FRAUDULENT INSURANCE ACT, WHICH IS A CRIME AND SUBJECTS THE PERSON TO CRIMINAL AND CIVIL PENALTIES.
